title: A Yank in Libya
writer: Arthur St. Claire, Sherman L. Lowe
actors: Walter Woolf King, Joan Woodbury, H.B. Warner
plot: American correspondent Mike Malone uncovers a Nazi plot for an uprising of the Arab tribes in Lybia. Pursued by Sheik David and his men, Mike takes refuge in the suite of Nancy Brooks, who is in the British Intelligence. He asks h...
